WT: 0.1 Size: TINY
Class: ALL
Race: ALL

This item can be used in tradeskills.

Race: ALL

Item Type:Combinable

Item Updated By:Gidono

Page Updated:Sun May 10th, 2020

Expansion: Original
Average Price: 150pp Pricing Data...
Rarity: Common
Level to Attain: 9

This item is a ground spawn.

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name

Steamfont Mountains
The Twilight Sea
Can find these in Steamfont Mountains at,

#1 These three cogs on the ground have spawns on, around, or inside of them. 1488, -1401, 2

#2 The 4 pillars outside mino cave. One ground spawn on each side. 1250, -1580, 17

Ground Spawn Map Locations:(Put this in your steamfontmts_3.txt map file)
P 1607.53, -1226.90, 16.63, 200, 0, 0, 2, iron_oxide
P 1563.07, -1272.36, 14.73, 160, 82, 45, 2, russet_oxide
P 1492.20, -1513.04, 6.89, 160, 82, 45, 2, russet
P 1478.99, -1583.77, 7.01, 200, 0, 0, 2, iron
P 1424.97, -1518.66, 10.29, 160, 82, 45, 2, russet
P 1449.92, -1511.95, 17.97, 200, 0, 0, 2, iron
P 1402.21, -1504.23, 6.85, 200, 0, 0, 2, iron
P 1381.11, -1440.51, 2.41, 160, 82, 45, 2, russet
P 1285.01, -1466.99, 2.41, 200, 0, 0, 2, iron
P 1251.92, -1500.95, 2.41, 160, 82, 45, 2, russet
P 1211.13, -1379.75, 14.17, 200, 0, 0, 2, iron
P 1189.99, -1385.14, 17.70, 160, 82, 45, 2, russet

Post Comment
working on Artisan's Prize.
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2025 at 1:54 PM Rating: Decent
borinlord
7 posts
I tried most places and wanted to let people know what I found. If you only need one maybe two Steamfont Mountains is the fastest/best. If you want to farm a few more I found the best place is Ruins of Old Paineel. just jump down and follow the path in one run through I got 6. Im sure others results will vary and I can't say how it will work out in TLP's I just wanted to maybe save time for someone else.
▲ Page top
Oakwynd TLP
QuoteReply
# Jan 12 2024 at 11:10 PM Rating: Decent
Dalarek
View User Forum
267 posts
Full clear of Marus Seru stonegrabbers gave me 2 iron oxide.

Ground spawns in Steamfont only gave me moss dragon scales every time.

The Hole doesn't seem to be a viable option because the wards and constructs don't exist for people who are doing this over a decade later for Artisan's Prize.

Farming for AP...

Dropped by "a stone ward" in The Hole as well, seems to be the best place to farm...respawn on ground spawns takes too long in Steamfont.

Ground spawns
QuoteReply
# Jan 07 2019 at 10:09 AM Rating: Excellent
Sir Sylphan
View User Forum
Guru
262 posts
In Steamfont Mountains there are six groundspawns of Iron Oxide and six of Russet Oxide, which reappear after roughly a day. If you want to pick them up, this may be a useful addition to your steamfontmts_3.txt:

P 1607.53, -1226.90, 16.63, 200, 0, 0, 2, iron_oxide
P 1563.07, -1272.36, 14.73, 160, 82, 45, 2, russet_oxide
P 1492.20, -1513.04, 6.89, 160, 82, 45, 2, russet
P 1478.99, -1583.77, 7.01, 200, 0, 0, 2, iron
P 1424.97, -1518.66, 10.29, 160, 82, 45, 2, russet
P 1449.92, -1511.95, 17.97, 200, 0, 0, 2, iron
P 1402.21, -1504.23, 6.85, 200, 0, 0, 2, iron
P 1381.11, -1440.51, 2.41, 160, 82, 45, 2, russet
P 1285.01, -1466.99, 2.41, 200, 0, 0, 2, iron
P 1251.92, -1500.95, 2.41, 160, 82, 45, 2, russet
P 1211.13, -1379.75, 14.17, 200, 0, 0, 2, iron
P 1189.99, -1385.14, 17.70, 160, 82, 45, 2, russet
▲ Page top
It's In The Hole
QuoteReply
# Nov 22 2018 at 2:52 PM Rating: Good
ChantressClio
Scholar
171 posts
"Cinderella story, 18th hole at Augusta...he's using about a 5-iron. Oh, what a shot! It's going.. It's in the Hole! It's in the Hole!"
Bill Murray - Caddyshack
I tried stonegrabbers in Marus Seru. Killed about 40 only got 3 iron oxide.
Tried Twilight Sea, cleared the island of all earth and fire elementals. Didn't get ANY.
Went to The Hole, Ruins of Old Paineel and got 9 in half the time.
Kill all the big black giant constructs at the point of no return pit near the zone in, then go into the first castle like building and keep left going down to the smaller steel looking constructs and gargoyles. This is where you get a lot fast. Be sure to look up at every wall and shoot the gargoyles off of them. The Hole is the way to go for these, plus you get alotta runes, pages and Tears of Prexus to make Celestial Temper too. And there's random gems for pocket change.
Clio
▲ Page top
The Hole
QuoteReply
# Oct 31 2017 at 1:57 AM Rating: Good
Aurastrider
Scholar
43 posts
After spending hours trying for the ground spawns I finally gave up. It got to the point of the same four spawns showing up and the others not respawning. I decided to go to the hole and just clearing the tunnel area got 10. Once you pick up the ground spawns I would ditch that area and head to the hole and just clear the tunnels a couple of times. This should give you more than enough.
▲ Page top
The Hole
QuoteReply
# Nov 22 2017 at 4:15 AM Rating: Good
Aurastrider
Scholar
43 posts
Now that I am a bit further into the artisan's prize you might want to consider going to the steppes for these since you will need steppes reptile meat. Farm your meat for later to save you a little time. This is of course if you are trying to get these for the artisan's prize.

# Jun 28 2017 at 7:18 AM Rating: Decent
svann
Scholar
361 posts
Cleard cogs and mino entrance got 1 iron oxide, several russet oxide and a couple scales.
Woke up this morning and found 1 scale and no other respawns.
Cleard Marus Seru got 1
Mons Letalis there was literally 1 studded rockgrabber in the entire zone. Dropped a medal. weee Im a winner too!
Finally went back for respawns in Marus Seru and got my 3rd.

# Sep 16 2011 at 12:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1602461923386
Scholar
21 posts
So after looking around. ALOT. And no useful information here (as usual) pertaining to exactly where the oxide spawns on the ground. I have these Loc's to share.

#1 These three cogs on the ground have spawns on, around, or inside of them. 1488 -1401 2

#2 The 4 pillars outside mino cave. One ground spawn on each side. 1250 -1580 17

LOC for ground spawns in steamfont.
QuoteReply
# May 13 2013 at 5:07 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1626049660621
4 posts
Can confirm that both Iron Oxide and Russet Oxide are ground spawns around the cogs outside the mino cave... I can also say that both appear as large oval gravel chunks and occur most frequently on the gears/tower themselves. As far as the respawn time, I do not know, as within a 10 minute period I had 6+ of each which was all I needed for safe creation of monk epic parts. Happy Hunting!

QuoteReply
# Feb 20 2004 at 10:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591790652603
2 posts
Hunted stonegrabbers in DSP for about 3 hours and went about 0/25. I guess I'll try Marus Seru next.
▲ Page top
Looted in Marus Seru
QuoteReply
# Jan 28 2004 at 2:39 PM Rating: Decent
Donbayne
View User Forum
Scholar
641 posts
A Stonegrabber in Marus Seru - 4
A Weathered Stonegrabber in Marus Seru - 1.
In about 2 hours of hunting.
I'm getting kind of lucky at "guessing" which stonies have the loot, but it's pure luck, it can drop from any type of stonegrabber of any level in Marus Seru. All of the mobs in the zone seem to wander quite far, I've followed a stonie from near the Netherbian Lair zone-in almost to the southwest corner where the Recuso Smugglers are, so I wouldn't expect a camp spot or a spawn point to find them at.
Currently selling for 60 - 75pp on Stromm if you can believe it. Too bad the Charcoal and Russet Oxide don't sell for the same.... I'd be twinked beyond belief!
P.S. Like Ragik said a looooong tiem ago Iron Oxide = Rust!!!
____________________________
Donbayne 100 Rng - Uinian 100 Dru - Breru 100 Sk - Nyenie 82 Brd - Ruusan 76 Clr - Braru 75 Mag - Syqen 100 Shm EQ Stromm/Luclin
